name: hlido-agent-reviews
description: The trust layer for AI agents - C2PA-verified reviews and Laddoo Scores.

endpoints.notes: Stateless JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTPS. POST for tools/list, tools/call, initialize. GET returns server summary.
MCP streamable HTTP transport (spec 2025-03-26). Same endpoint; request/response is stateless JSON-RPC.

tools.name: trust_check
tools.description: One-call Hlido trust answer for a reviewed AI agent. Accepts a slug or full URL, normalizes it, and returns score, tier, blockers, verdict summary, review URL, embed URL, and C2PA trust metadata.

agent_or_url.description: Agent slug or full URL to normalize and look up.

use_case.description: Optional free-text context for the caller's intent.

tools.name: find_trusted
tools.description: Find Hlido-reviewed agents for a free-text need. Matches the need against category, summary, and keywords, then returns ranked trust payloads.

need.description: Free-text intent, such as 'voice agent for SMB outbound'.

min_tier.description: Minimum tier filter. Defaults to STEADY.

tools.name: verify_claim
tools.description: Check whether a claim is present in the agent's server-card and whether Hlido has actually tested it. Returns honest nulls when tested data does not exist.

tools.name: compare_agents
tools.description: Compare multiple AI agents side by side using their Hlido Laddoo Scores, tiers, and verdicts. Pass up to 5 slugs. Returns a ranked comparison with scores and review URLs.

slugs.description: List of agent slugs to compare (max 5).

tools.name: submit_agent
tools.description: Submit an AI agent for Hlido review consideration. Hlido reviews are independent and methodology-driven. Returns a confirmation and next steps.

url.description: Public URL of the agent to review.

name.description: Name of the agent or product.

note.description: Optional context: category, why it matters, or known access details.
